title: Temporary value dropped while borrowed
explanation: This error occurs when you create a reference to a temporary value that gets dropped at the end of the statement. The reference would become dangling because the temporary value it points to no longer exists.
error_message: error[E0716]: temporary value dropped while borrowed

fixes.description: Bind the temporary to a variable first
Use the value directly without borrowing

tip: Temporaries are dropped at the end of the statement unless bound to a let binding, which extends their lifetime to the enclosing scope.
